---
title: "R training"
author: Musawer
date: 03/18/2026
format: html
editor: visual
---

I'm learning R

```{r}
2
3
4
5
typeof(8.5)
```

```{r}
"text string are fun"
typeof("strings")
```

```{r}
a <- c(1, 2, 3)
a
c("a","b","c")
c(TRUE, FALSE)
c(1,"two",3)
```

```{r}
my_list <- list(numbers =(1,2,3), words = 
```

```{r}
#| label; setup
source("training_source.R")
```
